description.en: Kanazawa's 300-year-old 'Kitchen of Kanazawa' with 170+ stalls selling fresh seafood, produce, and street food. Try the kaisen-don (seafood rice bowl) piled high with local catches.
description.ja: 300年以上の歴史を持つ「金沢の台所」。170以上の店舗で新鮮な魚介、野菜、食べ歩きグルメが楽しめる。地元の海鮮丼が絶品。

address.ja: 石川県金沢市上近江町50

description.en: The largest tea house in Higashi Chaya District, designated as Kanazawa City Preservation Architecture. Open for daytime tours with gold leaf tea room. Operates as exclusive geisha house at night.
description.ja: ひがし茶屋街最大の茶屋で金沢市保存建造物。昼間は金箔の茶室見学が可能。夜は一見さんお断りの芸妓の茶屋として営業。

tips: Gold leaf tatami room on 2nd floor is stunning
Matcha and gold leaf sweets available

description.en: National Important Cultural Property built in 1820. Authentic Edo-period tea house with original furnishings intact. Adjacent Kansonan tea room serves matcha overlooking the garden.
description.ja: 1820年築の国指定重要文化財。江戸時代の調度品がそのまま残る本物の茶屋。隣接の寒村庵で庭を眺めながら抹茶を楽しめる。

tips: The tea room serves excellent matcha

description.en: Hojicha specialty shop by 1863-founded Maruhachi tea company, in a renovated machiya in Higashi Chaya. Famous for Kaga bocha (roasted stem tea) served in a gallery-cafe setting.
description.ja: 1863年創業の丸八製茶場が手がけるほうじ茶専門店。ひがし茶屋街の改装町家で加賀棒茶をギャラリーカフェで提供。

description.en: Kanazawa produces 99% of Japan's gold leaf. Experience gold leaf application workshops, browse gold leaf crafts, and try gold leaf ice cream at this iconic shop.
description.ja: 金沢は日本の金箔の99%を生産。金箔貼り体験、金箔工芸品の購入、名物の金箔ソフトクリームを楽しめる。

tips: Gold leaf application workshop takes about 60 min
The gold leaf ice cream is Instagram-famous
Beautiful gold leaf accessories as souvenirs

description.en: Atmospheric neighborhood of earthen walls and water channels where samurai families once lived. Nomura Samurai House features a magnificent garden ranked in top 3 in Japan.
description.ja: 土壁と用水路が残る武家屋敷の面影を残す雰囲気ある地区。野村家の庭園は日本庭園ランキング上位に選出。

tips: Beautiful in winter with komo-gake straw wall covers

description.en: The quieter and more atmospheric of Kanazawa's tea districts, along the Asano River. Narrow stone-paved lanes between wooden tea houses with almost no tourists. Best at dusk.
description.ja: 浅野川沿いの静かで風情ある茶屋街。石畳の細い路地に木造の茶屋が並び、観光客がほとんどいない。夕暮れ時が最高。

tips: Walk along Asano River for best views
Connected to Higashi Chaya by a short bridge

description.en: Charming museum of daily life housed in a beautiful Meiji-era wooden school building. Exhibits of Kanazawa household items from the Meiji to Showa eras. Very few tourists visit.
description.ja: 美しい明治時代の木造校舎を利用した暮らしの博物館。明治〜昭和の金沢の生活用品を展示。観光客がほとんど来ない穴場。

tips: Hands-on exhibits of old household items

description.en: Legendary Kanazawa oden restaurant operating since 1927 in the Katamachi entertainment district. Kanazawa-style oden features unique local ingredients like kuruma-fu (wheat gluten) and kani-men (crab shell).
description.ja: 1927年創業の片町の伝説的な金沢おでん店。車麩やカニ面など金沢独自の具材が特徴の金沢おでんを提供。

tips: Try the kani-men (whole crab shell stuffed with crab meat)

description.en: The least touristy of Kanazawa's three tea districts. Small but perfectly preserved Edo-era tea houses with a local confectionery shop and traditional craft stores.
description.ja: 金沢三茶屋街の中で最も観光客が少ない。小さいながらも江戸時代の茶屋が完璧に保存され、和菓子店や工芸店が並ぶ。

tips: Most peaceful of the three tea districts
Try Moroeya confectionery for local sweets

description.en: Traditional wagashi confectionery established in 1849, famous for Kanazawa's signature rakugan pressed sugar sweets. Beautiful seasonal designs in elegant packaging.
description.ja: 1849年創業の老舗和菓子店。金沢名物の落雁で有名。美しい季節のデザインと上品な包装。

description.en: Craft beer bar and pizzeria one minute from Higashi Chaya District. Neapolitan-style pizzas paired with locally brewed beers in a casual atmosphere.
description.ja: ひがし茶屋街から徒歩1分のクラフトビールバー&ピッツェリア。ナポリ風ピザと地ビールを気軽に楽しめる。

tips: Good after a day of tea house hopping
Small space — arrive early on weekends

description.en: Buddhist temple built in 1643 with hidden staircases, trap doors, secret rooms, and escape tunnels originally designed to protect the feudal lord. Fascinating guided tours.
description.ja: 1643年建立の寺院。隠し階段、落とし穴、隠し部屋、抜け道など、藩主を守るための仕掛けが満載。ガイドツアーが魅力的。

tips: Reservation required — book online or by phone

name.ja: 浅野川大橋周辺の酒蔵

description.en: Several small sake breweries and tasting rooms clustered near Asano River bridge. Fukumitsuya, founded in 1625, is the oldest brewery in Kanazawa offering free tours and tastings.
description.ja: 浅野川大橋付近に集まる小規模酒蔵と試飲室。1625年創業の福光屋は金沢最古の酒蔵で無料の見学・試飲が可能。

tips: Try the junmai sake paired with local snacks

description.en: Quiet uphill street between Kenroku-en and 21st Century Museum lined with traditional craft shops — Kutani pottery, Kanazawa lacquerware, Kaga yuzen dyed silk.
description.ja: 兼六園と21世紀美術館の間の静かな坂道に伝統工芸品店が並ぶ。九谷焼、金沢漆器、加賀友禅など。

tips: Some shops offer pottery painting workshops
Connect museum visit with craft shopping

description.en: Old-school yoshoku (Western-style Japanese) restaurant famous for its original curry rice since the Taisho era. No-frills local favorite with retro atmosphere and generous portions.
description.ja: 大正時代から続く洋食の老舗。オリジナルカレーライスが名物。飾り気のないレトロな雰囲気と量が自慢の地元民の定番。

tips: The original curry is their signature
Fills up fast at lunch — go before noon
